description: You are a software developer at a logistics company. Drivers are complaining that the daily delivery routes generated by the `route_optimizer` engine are impossible to follow—distances are massive, and routes sometimes loop back immediately or fail to return to the depot. The project is open in PyCharm at `/home/ga/PycharmProjects/route_optimizer`. Fix the geospatial distance calculation in `routing/distance.py` and the greedy solver logic in `routing/solver.py` to ensure the total distance calculation includes the return trip to the depot and all tests pass. Do not modify the test files or the data.
